Today, with restaurants across the UK, we still pride ourselves on serving a variety of handcrafted burgers from our GBK kitchens. The very same burgers are also available in supermarkets, inspiring shoppers to recreate the gourmet burger experience at home. 100% of our beef, from restaurants to supermarkets, comes from British Farms, guaranteeing the highest standards of flavour and texture. Our ingredients are simple with no added nasties... 99% beef, with just a pinch of salt and pepper. We use selected cuts of beef to craft our burgers for you to enjoy in our restaurants or at home.
